name: resolver-a1-profile-beats-factory
description: ADR 0037 Phase V — precedence rule: profile beats factory. Apply Workshop, assert that `nodeHaloVariant` (which Workshop declares as `'soft-glow'`) reads the profile's value and is tagged provenance=`'profile'`. Locks the second tier of the cascade. Drops out of the suite if my model is wrong about either the value or the source tag.

commands: (async () => { const a = window.__canaryApplyProfile('workshop'); if (!a || a.ok !== true) throw new Error('applyProfile failed: ' + JSON.stringify(a)); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const perf = window.__canaryGetPerfSettings(); if (!perf || perf.ok !== true) throw new Error('getPerfSettings failed: ' + JSON.stringify(perf)); if (perf.value.nodeHaloVariant !== 'soft-glow') throw new Error('expected nodeHaloVariant=soft-glow after Workshop apply, got: ' + perf.value.nodeHaloVariant); const prov = window.__qualiaGetSettingProvenance('nodeHaloVariant'); if (!prov || prov.ok !== true) throw new Error('getSettingProvenance failed: ' + JSON.stringify(prov)); if (prov.value !== 'profile') throw new Error('expected provenance=profile, got: ' + prov.value); return 'A1 pass: nodeHaloVariant=' + perf.value.nodeHaloVariant + ' prov=' + prov.value; })()
